sql_array: CREATE TABLE RDF_QUAD (g VARCHAR(255), s VARCHAR(255), p INTEGER, o INTEGER);
INSERT INTO RDF_QUAD (g, s, p, o) VALUES ('geometry1', 'subject1', iri_to_id('http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#geometry'), DB.DBA.rdf_geo_add(rdf_box(st_point(10, 20), 256, 257, 0, 1)));
UPDATE RDF_QUAD SET g = 'geometry2' WHERE s = 'subject1';
SELECT s, DB.DBA.rdf_geo_add(rdf_box(st_point(15, 25), 256, 257, 0, 1)) FROM RDF_QUAD WHERE g = 'geometry1';
